title: Craftable Mount Armor
description: Craft horse and nautilus armor at the crafting table!
body:
# Craftable Mount Armor

Craft armor for horses and the Nautilus in the crafting table.

-> Craftable Horse Armor

-> Craftable Nautilus Armor

You can craft horse armor with x7 of your chosen material plus a leather horse armor, and you can craft Nautilus Armor with x8 of your chosen material.

Make sure you're using the correct version for your Minecraft version. If you only want horse armor to be craftable in newer versions, please use an older version (1.21.9-10).

## Recipes
![Change the Copper for any material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55cd166dfe7365b4738ac9d1fd3ece3789ef97b9.png)

![Change the Copper for any material (Nautilus Armor not shown)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a856423ae89c5eecfa2249e4cce2dfeb3f922cf6.png)
